rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to visible ports or features.
Use annex agree blocks for component type contracts with concrete bounds or named constants.
generic_rules: Write assumptions and guarantees using visible identifiers from the AADL model.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts.
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicit typed ports are available.
Relate outputs to inputs in type scope guarantees using visible variables only.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use `eq` for helper declarations and boolean expressions in AGREE contracts.
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponents in component type annexes.
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers for range checks.
